response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The video contains gameplay commentary without vocal music, matching the reference description. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized manual translation and transcription for all gameplay commentary, including both Japanese and English utterances. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue blocks directly to the VTuber's voice, accounting for pauses and transition moments, and translating Japanese lines accurately.

subtitles.original: I mean, as a farmer, you can have a maximum of, what was it, three?
subtitles.english: I mean, as a farmer, you can have a maximum of, what was it, three?

subtitles.original: So I could have one more. I think, I think we should have one more.
subtitles.english: So I could have one more. I think, I think we should have one more.

subtitles.original: Now I have two. I'll get more bees.
subtitles.english: Now I have two. I'll get more bees.

subtitles.original: I don't know what I would have used it on otherwise, other than gambling.
subtitles.english: I don't know what I would have used it on otherwise, other than gambling.

subtitles.original: Wait, could we also sell fish, too? I don't remember.
subtitles.english: Wait, could we also sell fish, too? I don't remember.

subtitles.original: つり、つり、つり、つり、つり、つり、つり、つり、つり...
subtitles.english: Fishing, fishing, fishing, fishing, fishing, fishing, fishing, fishing, fishing...

subtitles.original: I got a bottle of water.
subtitles.english: I got a bottle of water.

subtitles.original: Maybe I should make a fishing shack.
subtitles.english: Maybe I should make a fishing shack.

subtitles.original: So I'm unbothered while I fish...
subtitles.english: So I'm unbothered while I fish...

subtitles.original: ...at the end of the day, after a long day of earning moneys.
subtitles.english: ...at the end of the day, after a long day of earning moneys.

subtitles.original: Okay, I will leave at 59 so that nothing bugs out when the server closes.
subtitles.english: Okay, I will leave at 59 so that nothing bugs out when the server closes.

subtitles.original: Okay, one more fish, one more fish.
subtitles.english: Okay, one more fish, one more fish.

subtitles.original: I shall wrap it up here for today!
subtitles.english: I shall wrap it up here for today!

subtitles.original: Thank you very much, everyone, for keeping me company.
subtitles.english: Thank you very much, everyone, for keeping me company.

subtitles.original: 見に来てくれてありがとうございました。
subtitles.english: Thank you very much for coming to watch.

subtitles.original: いや、枕... 枕... 枕だってもいいんじゃないですか？
subtitles.english: Yeah, pillow... pillow... even a pillow would be fine, wouldn't it?

subtitles.original: Oh, maybe I should have made myself glow.
subtitles.english: Oh, maybe I should have made myself glow.

subtitles.original: I shall see you guys tomorrow, for hopefully a little more fishing!
subtitles.english: I shall see you guys tomorrow, for hopefully a little more fishing!

subtitles.original: But it was fun, it was fun.
subtitles.english: But it was fun, it was fun.

subtitles.original: Anyways, thank you. Until next time, take care.
subtitles.english: Anyways, thank you. Until next time, take care.
